ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "province_state" TEXT /* Name of the province or state */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Name of the country or region */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude coordinate of the region */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude coordinate of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "health_authority" TEXT /* Name of the primary health authority in the region */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_case_counts" (
  "case_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case count report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the cases were reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "case_count" INTEGER /* Number of cases reported on that date */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported on that date */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases that have recovered */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths reported on that date */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., Local Health Department, Hospital) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_case_counts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cumulative_case_counts" (
  "cumulative_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cumulative count report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where cumulative cases were counted */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "cumulative_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases up to that date */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of recovered cases up to that date */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of deaths up to that date */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of active cases (total cases - recovered cases - deaths) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cumulative_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cumulative_case_counts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region associated with the demographics */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density per square kilometer */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of age groups as a JSON string */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of gender as a JSON string */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ethnicity as a JSON string */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date when the demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health official */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official (e.g., Epidemiologist, Data Analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Official email address */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the official works in */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the official */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the official's account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_officials_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health alert */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the alert is issued */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was issued */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of health alert (e.g., Outbreak, Warning) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "actions_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken in response to the alert */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health official who issued the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_alerts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_alerts_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES health_officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing center */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the center is located */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the testing center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the center */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the center */,
  "testing_capacity" INTEGER /* Testing capacity of the center per day */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the center */,
  "last_reporting_date" TEXT /* Date of the last report from the center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_centers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_centers" (
  "vaccination_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination center */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the center is located */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the center */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the center */,
  "vaccination_capacity" INTEGER /* Vaccination capacity of the center per day */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the center */,
  "last_reporting_date" TEXT /* Date of the last report from the center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_centers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the symptom */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level (e.g., Mild, Moderate, Severe) */,
  "common_in_age_group" TEXT /* Age group where the symptom is most common */,
  "prevalence_rate" REAL /* Prevalence rate of the symptom in affected populations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the treatment involves */,
  "efficacy" REAL /* Efficacy rate of the treatment */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Common side effects of the treatment */,
  "cost" REAL /* Average cost of the treatment */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the treatment (e.g., Widely Available, Limited) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treatment the medication is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Common side effects */,
  "formulation" TEXT /* Formulation of the medication (e.g., Oral, Intravenous) */,
  "brand_names" TEXT /* Brand names of the medication */,
  "generic_name" TEXT /* Generic name of the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preventive_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preventive measure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the preventive measure */,
  "effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness rate of the measure */,
  "implementation_cost" REAL /* Cost of implementing the measure */,
  "implementation_duration" TEXT /* Duration required to implement the measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import record */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date of the data import */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., Government, NGO) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data imported (e.g., Case counts, Demographics) */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the data import (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  "imported_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the health official who imported the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_imported_by FOREIGN KEY ("imported_by") REFERENCES health_officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_periods" (
  "reporting_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reporting period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reporting period (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the health official who reported the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reporting_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_periods_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES health_officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., Chart, Map) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Data source used for the visualization */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the health official who created the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES health_officials ("official_id")
)
